overview: Izzet Lessons is a Combo-Control archetype that leverages graveyard synergy and looting effects to generate massive card advantage. The deck combines Gran-Gran and Accumulate Wisdom with the Lessons package to fuel the Monument to Endurance and Artist's Talent engine. This synergy allows the deck to survive early aggression while accelerating into a late-game resource disparity that overwhelms opponents.
win_conditions: Monument to Endurance and Artist's Talent engine
Gran-Gran and Accumulate Wisdom combo for card advantage
Stormchaser's Talent and Otters for board pressure

keep_criteria: Hands with early interaction like Firebending Lesson or Boomerang Basics
Hands containing Gran-Gran or Accumulate Wisdom with adequate land count
Hands that can proactively use mana to set up permanents
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early mana sources to proactively play permanents
Hands heavy on late-game cards without early interaction or one-drops
Hands without ways to fill the graveyard for Accumulate Wisdom

examples.reason: Provides early interaction, a one-drop protector, and the core combo pieces with sufficient lands to play proactively.
Lacks early mana and one-drops to set up the engine proactively, risking early beatdown.

early_game: Play Gran-Gran as a one-drop to protect against early beatdown and enable Monument to Endurance
Use Firebending Lesson or Boomerang Basics for early spot removal and stalling
Proactively spend mana to set up permanents and avoid flooding
mid_game: Loot cards with Abandon Attachments to dig for answers and fill the graveyard with Lessons
Activate Monument to Endurance triggers by looting or attacking with Gran-Gran
Use Artist's Talent to reduce costs and filter the hand for combo pieces
late_game: Cast Accumulate Wisdom with three Lessons in the graveyard to draw three cards and create a massive resource disparity
Use Gran-Gran as a cost reducer for late-game spells
Leverage Monument to Endurance to recover from unfavorable matchups by generating mana or Lava Spikes

key_cards.name: Monument to Endurance
key_cards.notes: Turns looting effects into Lava Spikes, mana, or card advantage. Enables survival against aggro and acceleration against control.

key_cards.name: Artist's Talent
key_cards.notes: Reduces costs and filters the hand to ensure resources keep flowing. Synergizes with Monument to Endurance.

key_cards.name: Gran-Gran
key_cards.notes: Protects against early beatdown, enables Monument to Endurance with attack trigger, and reduces spell costs in the late game.

key_cards.name: Accumulate Wisdom
key_cards.notes: Draws three cards for low cost when three Lessons are in the graveyard. Functions like Ancestral Recall when combined with cost reducers.

key_cards.name: Stormchaser's Talent
key_cards.notes: Creates Otters with Prowess that opponents cannot ignore. Benefits from Boomerang Basics interactions.

key_cards.name: Boomerang Basics
key_cards.notes: Stalls beatdown, provides extra turns, and can return permanents to hand to reuse triggers.

key_cards.name: Abandon Attachments
key_cards.notes: Digs for answers while putting Lessons into the graveyard to activate Accumulate Wisdom and Monument to Endurance.

key_cards.name: Agna Qel'a
key_cards.notes: Avoids flooding by turning dead lands into discard fuel, providing another way to trigger Monument to Endurance.

sequencing_tips: Sequence looting effects like Abandon Attachments before Monument to Endurance is on the battlefield to maximize value.
Return Stormchaser's Talent or Monument to Endurance to hand with Boomerang Basics to reset them as new objects and reuse all triggers.
Prioritize playing Gran-Gran early to protect against beatdown and enable Monument to Endurance triggers through combat.
Use Firebending Lesson early for spot removal, but hold it if you need to fill the graveyard with Lessons for Accumulate Wisdom.

matchups.advice: Side in Quantum Riddler and Soul-Guide Lantern. Use Lantern to lock combos and prevent opponent from extracting value from Lessons.
Side in Soul-Guide Lantern to lock their combo for a turn and prevent them from extracting more value.
Side in Annul and Price of Freedom to deal with problematic artifacts and enchantments. Use Abrade for proactive plays.

matchups.opponent_archetype: Go Wide / Bant Airbending / Simic Aggro
matchups.advice: Side in Pyroclasm and Torch the Tower. Use Iroh's Demonstration to clear boards full of tokens.
Side in Pyroclasm and Torch the Tower. Use Gran-Gran's body to block early and Monument to Endurance for recovery.
Side in Torch the Tower and Abrade. Focus on card advantage with Accumulate Wisdom to outvalue their threats.

common_threats: Recurring threats or creatures with death triggers
Larger threats that require stack interaction

overview_evidence.evidence_span: The archetype is a sort of Combo-Control, using the graveyard and looting effects to combine Accumulate Wisdom and Gran-Gran for card advantage, coupled with the Monument to Endurance and Artist's Talent engine as a win condition.

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: coupled with the Monument to Endurance and Artist's Talent engine as a win condition.
using the graveyard and looting effects to combine Accumulate Wisdom and Gran-Gran for card advantage
Stormchaser's Talent generates pressure. The Otters with Prowess are threats the opponent cannot ignore

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: can also return Stormchaser's Talent or Monument to Endurance to hand, where it becomes a new object and can reuse all triggers.
Its attack trigger enables Monument to Endurance
Abandon Attachments functions as the accelerator. It digs for answers or engines while putting the necessary lessons into the graveyard

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: Its body protects against early-game beatdown
allows clearing boards full of tokens
ideal for dealing with recurring threats or creatures with death triggers
deals with problematic artifacts and enchantments in the current Metagame
have difficulty dealing with larger threats
